lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Greetings Bwana! My name is Yanni and I buy and sell antiques.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about this antiques business.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I buy antiques and other interesting items. If you have any interesting items that you might want to sell me, please let me see them and I'll offer you a fair price.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Would you like me to have a look at your items and give you a quote?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Sorry Bwana, you have nothing I am interested in.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I'll give you 100 coins for the Bone Key...

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I'll give you 100 coins for the Stone Plaque...

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I'll give you 100 coins for the tattered scroll...

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I'll give you 100 coins for the crumpled scroll...

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I'll give you 500 coins for your locating crystal...

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: I'll give you 1000 coins for your 'Beads of the Dead'...

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: And that's the only item I am interested in. If you want to sell me that item, simply show it to me.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Those are the items I am interested in Bwana. If you want to sell me those items, simply show them to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe some other time?

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Sure thing. Have a nice day Bwana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any interesting items for sale?

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Sorry, [Sir/Madam], I have nothing that you need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, sorry, not interested.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Fair enough, come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: That's a great bone key. Here's 100 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: That's a great crumpled scroll. Here's 100 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: That's a great tattered scroll. Here's 100 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: That's a great copy of Bervirius notes. Here's 100 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: That's a great Locating Crystal. Here's 500 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: That's a great stone-plaque. Here's 100 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Impressive necklace there, here's 1000 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Ah you'd like to sell this to me would you? I can offer you 5000 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll sell it for 5000 coins.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Very well my friend, let me count out your reward.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I think I'll hold on it a while longer yet.

lines.speaker: Yanni Salika
lines.text: Very well my friend, come back if you change your mind.
